title: LINFO2145 Cloud Computing Project
description: Cloud-native application with microservices architecture, deployed on Azure with automated CI/CD and comprehensive monitoring.
longDescription: Cloud-native application developed as part of the LINFO2145 - Cloud Computing course. The project implements a modern microservices architecture with automated Azure deployment, comprehensive monitoring, and high availability.
challenges: Main challenges: implementing scalable microservices architecture, cloud performance and cost optimization, distributed state management, and setting up effective monitoring systems.

title: Thesis - Carbon Calculator
description: Master's thesis on developing an intelligent carbon footprint calculator with AI and environmental data analysis.
longDescription: Master's thesis focused on developing an intelligent carbon footprint calculator. The project combines machine learning, data analysis, and modern user interface to raise awareness about environmental issues and provide concrete solutions for emission reduction.
challenges: Development of an innovative predictive model combining behavioral data and machine learning algorithms to optimize carbon footprint reduction recommendations.

title: Open Source Project LINFO2171
description: Significant contribution to an open source project with new features development and performance improvements.
longDescription: Major contribution project to a popular open source tool as part of LINFO2171 course. Focus on improving a development tool with new APIs, optimized user interface and 40% performance improvements.
challenges: In-depth analysis of complex codebase, seamless integration of new features without breaking existing functionality, collaboration with maintenance team and adherence to open source community standards.

title: Image Processing Project
description: Development of image processing algorithms as part of an open source project with advanced filtering and segmentation techniques.
longDescription: Image processing algorithms development project using modern approaches. The project explores different filtering, segmentation and image enhancement techniques while optimizing performance.
challenges: Algorithm optimization for high-resolution images, efficient memory management and implementation of parallelized algorithms.

title: Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks
description: Implementation and study of conditional generative adversarial networks for controlled image generation with performance improvements.
longDescription: Research project on CGAN for conditional image generation. The project explores the use of conditions to guide the generation process and significantly improve the quality of produced images.
challenges: Balancing generator/discriminator training, preventing mode collapse and fine-tuning hyperparameters for stable convergence.

title: Skijo — Skyjo implementation
description: Python implementation of the Skyjo card game with Tkinter UI, scoring system and multiplayer logic.
longDescription: Skijo is a digital implementation of Skyjo. The project includes game logic, a Tkinter UI, round and score management, and a bot skeleton.
challenges: Game state management, initial reveal phase and bot AI improvements.

title: KAPsule Temporelle
description: Visual cryptography web application combining steganography, encryption and camera recognition authentication to hide secret messages.
longDescription: KAPsule Temporelle is an innovative application that combines steganography, Fernet encryption and biometric authentication. My main contribution focuses on the image recognition system using YOLO v8, MediaPipe and DeepFace to create a multi-level authentication challenge.
challenges: Integration of 4 real-time AI models, CPU performance optimization, creation of a multi-modal authentication system resistant to replay attacks.

title: Game Jab - Gamified Learning System
description: Innovative language learning platform combining spaced repetition techniques and gamification to optimize vocabulary acquisition.
longDescription: Game Jab is a personal project developing a gamified educational platform for language learning. The system integrates spaced repetition algorithms, game mechanics and a modern user interface to maximize the efficiency of vocabulary learning.
challenges: Optimization of memorization algorithms, creation of an engaging user experience, efficient local data management and progress synchronization.

title: English Teacher 3 - Automated Anki Generator
description: Automated English vocabulary learning system that generates Anki decks from movie and TV show subtitles. Uses AI and NLP to extract and filter B2-C1 level vocabulary.
longDescription: English Teacher 3 is an automation project for English vocabulary learning. The system analyzes movie and TV show subtitles, extracts relevant vocabulary using SpaCy, filters by CEFR level (B2-C1), and automatically generates enriched Anki cards with translations, definitions, examples, and audio pronunciation.
challenges: Optimizing linguistic filtering to avoid 88% noise, integrating multiple APIs (Dictionary, TTS), intelligent audio cache management and automated CEFR scoring system.
